title: New Toy
content:
[FinalPiece](http://finalpiece.net) got new toy and it does color.

![](https://macsfvent.sgp1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/media/2007/05/fpc_newtoy/02.jpg)

![](https://macsfvent.sgp1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/media/2007/05/fpc_newtoy/05.jpg)

![](https://macsfvent.sgp1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/media/2007/05/fpc_newtoy/03.jpg)

![](https://macsfvent.sgp1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/media/2007/05/fpc_newtoy/04.jpg)

... and now we can do small-size printing, among many other things we are currently doing. :P

![](https://macsfvent.sgp1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/media/2007/05/fpc_newtoy/01.jpg)

... and she never complains eventhough the company never provides her with free gas. ;)

Peace. Heheheheh.
